training_status: lifting 3-4x per week, cardio 2-3x per week

benefits.description: Started tirzepatide in April at 300 lbs, now at 238 lbs (62 lb loss over ~11 months). Added MOTS-c and AOD-9604 two weeks ago, down another 2 lbs since then.
Noticed subtle energy shift since adding AOD-9604
Cagrisema provided additional appetite suppression when used for a couple weeks a few months ago

side_effects.description: Cagrisema provided far more appetite suppression than expected, made it difficult to hit 200-220g protein goals

protocol_notes: Started tirzepatide in April at 300 lbs. Does not track calories, focuses on eating clean whole foods and limiting processed sugar. Plateaued at 240 lbs for 2 months before adding MOTS-c and AOD-9604. Used cagrisema for a couple weeks a few months ago but discontinued due to excessive appetite suppression interfering with protein intake. Currently maintaining tirzepatide with MOTS-c and AOD-9604 stack.
